PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-17-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated 8/27/20 is admitted to probate. Cathy Cho is appointed as the executor of the estate with full authority under the Independent Administration of Estates Act. Bond is not required. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open court. Status on close of estate is set for January 30, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Choi. Matter not reported.
